EXPLANATION: The paper "AI, Consumers & Psychological Harm" by Przemysław Pałka exists on SSRN (posted September 2023) as a book chapter in the Cambridge University Press volume *AI and Consumers*, exactly matching the cited title, author, venue, and year.
